beats.caption: AC-1 - card: name, host, ONLINE, latency, last seen
beats.expectedScreen: the studio-mac card highlighted: green dot + ONLINE, tailnet host 100.101.14.32, Agent 0.5.2, a Latency in ms, Last seen a few seconds ago

beats.caption: AC-2 - stale heartbeat flips card OFFLINE
beats.expectedScreen: the attic-mini card highlighted: red dot + OFFLINE, Last seen 12m ago (heartbeat past the 30s freshness window)

beats.caption: AC-3 - pairing mints token + one-line installer
beats.expectedScreen: the generated one-line installer command highlighted, a curl .../install.sh line carrying GARRISON_TOKEN= and GARRISON_MACHINE=loft-mac

beats.caption: AC-4 - invocation log entries render on the card
beats.expectedScreen: the studio-mac card highlighted showing the invocation-log table (WHEN / VERB / CALLER / MS / RESULT) with rows and callers orchestrator, dev-env, kanban-loop including a red failed row
